name: Nistha Sinha

services.title: Cybersecurity Analysis
services.description: Analyzing phishing attacks, identifying Indicators of Compromise (IOCs), and understanding threat behavior.

services.title: Threat Detection
services.description: Understanding attack patterns and applying detection techniques used in SOC environments.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: Building responsive and functional web applications.

aboutpara:
I am a BCA graduate with a growing focus on cybersecurity, driven by a strong interest in defensive security and Security Operations (SOC). I am particularly drawn to the investigative side of security—analyzing threats, uncovering attack patterns, and understanding how adversaries exploit systems.

Through hands-on projects and practical labs, I have developed foundational skills in phishing analysis, log investigation, and identifying indicators of compromise (IOCs). I am deeply curious about how defensive teams detect, monitor, and respond to incidents in real time.

With a background in development and structured problem-solving, I bring a balanced approach that combines technical awareness with analytical thinking. I am actively working toward building the skills required to contribute effectively in a SOC environment.

resume.description: Focused on building a strong foundation in cybersecurity with hands-on projects in phishing analysis and threat detection.

bullets: Assisted in recruitment processes including sourcing, screening, and interview coordination.
Worked with RESTful APIs and optimized database queries using Node.js and MySQL.
